table_name.description: Name of the table being extracted

source_url.description: URL where the table was found

extraction_complete.description: Whether all rows were successfully extracted

pagination_detected.description: Whether pagination was detected (indicating possible incomplete extraction)

extraction_notes.description: Any notes about the extraction (e.g., table structure issues, access problems)

rows.description: Array of extracted rows, each row is an object with column names as keys

items.description: A single row from the table with column names as keys and cell values as values
